summary: All three requirements (REQ-5, REQ-6, REQ-7) appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-5 is addressed in RosterSection.tsx with 'Meet With LEGEND' heading. REQ-6 is addressed in NewsSection.tsx with 'Join Now' and 'For Tournament' as two separate anchor elements.
